name: bidilens
description: Standards-first bidirectional text tooling for AI chat, Markdown, streaming UIs, and developer tools.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @bidilens/core && npm run build -w @bidilens/dom && npm run build -w @bidilens/markdown && npm run build -w @bidilens/react && npm run build -w @bidilens/cli && npm run build -w @bidilens/demo
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run corpus:check && npm run build
